subject: Fwd: M & M (surgery)
body:
.. waiting and hoping and  ... (isn't that an old song ?)for  your input  on 
Dr. Bridwell in St Louis
 Oh saw Barry Manilow here.  Gender issues, maybe , yet ,  great , so who 
cares.
write when you get up.. Going this weekend for my pre surgery  whatever.  (3 
hour flight - ich)
Marcia M.

From: Maemarcia@aol.com
Subject: M & M (surgery)
Date: Wed, 02 Apr 2008 18:11:17 GMT
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com

J - I'm so antsy.  Check him and hospital  out yet ? When you do, pls. write. 
 I am doing all the
 pre-op work.  Holy cow - it is a job and  compelling & endless.   Respect 
your input so much.  
p.s. you'll know what I meant about "the CLINTON" thing when you  GOOGLE HIM 
. You just more handsome and "Ralph Lauren-y "  Your age  too .           
<BRIDWELL,  Ortho - smart >
Marsh
